---
title: "teacup id-collision fixture"
format: html
filters:
  - teacup
teacup:
  cache: _fixture-cache
---

Two diagrams using `\clip` and `\shade`. dvisvgm restarts its element ids
(`pgfcp1`, `pgfsh1`) in every SVG; unscoped, diagram 2 would be clipped by
diagram 1's clip path and shaded with its gradient (regression check).

```{.tikz}
\clip (0,0) rectangle (1.5,0.8);
\shade[left color=accent,right color=accent2] (0,0) rectangle (2,1);
```

```{.tikz}
\clip (0,0) rectangle (2,2);
\shade[left color=accent3,right color=accent4] (0,0) rectangle (2,2);
```
